purpose: Triage inbound health insurance claims to prioritize high-urgency clinical cases for human adjuster review. Does not approve, deny, or adjust claim amounts; produces an ordered queue only.
deployment_context: Production clinical-operations environment at a regional health insurance carrier. Integrated into the claims adjuster queue; adjusters always make the final determination.
governance_decisions: Approved continued production deployment following the 2026-Q1 model performance review.
Recorded disparate outcomes in the minors subpopulation; scheduled Clause 6.1.4 AISIA refresh for 2026-Q2.
Accepted remediation plan: adjuster-training module update and subpopulation-specific fairness metric added to the monitoring dashboard.
